title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: November 28, 2024
summary: November 28, 2024: The Arctic sea ice has continued to increase this week but at a lower rate of 4.66% (as opposed to last week’s increase rate of 5.34%), from the level on 11/21/2024 of 9.580 M km 2 to 10.048 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Ma...
